stories.title: **Headline:** No. 1 Oklahoma Enters SEC Tournament — 48-7, SEC Title Wrapped Up, Wells at 36 HR

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: No. 1 Oklahoma swept A&M, won the SEC title outright, and enters the SEC Tournament at 48-7. Kendall Wells still at 36 HRs — one from Espinoza's 31-year-old all-time NCAA record. The record chase moves to Lexington. #Sooners #SECSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Oklahoma: 48-7. SEC regular season CHAMPIONS. No. 1 seed. Double bye. And Wells at 36 HRs — one swing from history. The SEC Tournament starts TODAY. Who's watching? #Sooners #NCAASoftball

article.headline: Oklahoma Enters SEC Tournament as No. 1 Seed — Wells at 36 HR, One From All-Time NCAA Record

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
#### Image Concept 1 — Social (1080x1350)
**Type:** gemini / complete
**Story:** Oklahoma No. 1 Seed — Wells at 36 HR
**Visual:** Oklahoma softball batter in power pose at the plate, crimson and cream, dramatic stadium lighting at night. Bold white text overlay on dark navy bar: "SEC CHAMPIONS" above, "Wells: 36 HRs — One From History" below. ILS brand orange accent stripe at bottom. High contrast, championship energy.
**Mood:** Dominant, historic, on the edge of something legendary
**Text overlay:** "SEC CHAMPIONS — Wells at 36 HRs"

#### Image Concept 2 — Article Hero (1200x630)
**Type:** gemini / complete
**Story:** Oklahoma No. 1 Seed
**Visual:** Celebration scene — Oklahoma softball players in dugout with "SEC CHAMPIONS" banner in background. Text overlay bar at bottom: "OKLAHOMA — 48-7 — SEC REGULAR SEASON CHAMPIONS". Dark navy semi-transparent bar behind text. Landscape composition for article hero.
**Mood:** Victory, momentum, postseason ready

stories.title: **Headline:** NiJaree Canady Throws First Career Perfect Game — Texas Tech 50-5, First Team to 50 Wins

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: NiJaree Canady threw a PERFECT GAME on Senior Day. 8-0 over Baylor. First career perfecto. Texas Tech now 50-5 — first team in the country to reach 50 wins. Big 12 Tournament starts Wednesday in OKC. #WreckEm #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: Texas Tech. 50-5. No. 1 seed at Devon Park. NiJaree Canady: 1,000+ career Ks, multiple no-hitters, and now a PERFECT GAME on Senior Day. Is she the best pitcher in college softball history? Asking for a friend. #WreckEm #Softball

article.headline: NiJaree Canady Throws First Career Perfect Game on Senior Day — Texas Tech First Program to 50 Wins

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
#### Image Concept 1 — Social (1080x1350)
**Type:** gemini / complete
**Story:** Canady Perfect Game — Texas Tech 50-5
**Visual:** Dramatic windmill pitcher in mid-release, Texas Tech red uniform, stadium lights illuminating the mound. Text overlay: "PERFECT GAME" in massive Bebas Neue white letters. Sub-text: "NiJaree Canady | Senior Day | TTU 50-5". Dark overlay, red accent elements, ILS brand footer.
**Mood:** Legendary, dominant, once-in-a-career moment
**Text overlay:** "PERFECT GAME — NiJaree Canady | Texas Tech 50-5"

#### Image Concept 2 — Article Hero (1200x630)
**Type:** gemini / complete
**Story:** Canady Perfect Game
**Visual:** Pitcher walking off mound triumphantly, teammates sprinting in from the field to celebrate. Scoreboard in background shows 8-0. Text overlay: "CANADY'S PERFECT GAME — TEXAS TECH REACHES 50 WINS". Landscape, jubilant atmosphere.
**Mood:** Senior Day magic, perfection, celebration

stories.title: **Headline:** Nebraska Sweeps Penn State, Wins Big Ten Regular Season Title Outright — 43-6

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text: Nebraska swept Penn State to win the Big Ten regular season title OUTRIGHT. 43-6. 23-1 in conference — tying the Big Ten record for most conference wins. Big Ten Tournament starts TOMORROW in College Park. #Huskers #BigTen

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text: A program that didn't even have softball a generation ago now has the Big Ten regular season title. Nebraska 43-6. Big Ten Tournament tomorrow. National seed conversation is real. #Huskers #NCAASoftball

article.headline: Nebraska Claims First-Ever Big Ten Regular Season Title — 43-6, No. 1 Seed for Tournament

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
#### Image Concept 1 — Social (1080x1350)
**Type:** gemini / complete
**Story:** Nebraska Wins Big Ten Title
**Visual:** Nebraska softball player in red jersey raising arms in celebration at Penn State's field, Big Ten Championship graphic element in corner. Text overlay: "BIG TEN CHAMPIONS" in gold on navy bar. Sub-text: "Nebraska 43-6 | 23-1 Big Ten | Program's First Title". Clean, powerful, championship feel.
**Mood:** Historic, landmark achievement, quiet confidence
**Text overlay:** "BIG TEN CHAMPIONS — Nebraska 43-6"

#### Image Concept 2 — Article Hero (1200x630)
**Type:** gemini / complete
**Story:** Nebraska Wins Big Ten Title
**Visual:** Team celebration on field, Nebraska Cornhuskers red and white, confetti or champagne element. Landscape composition. Text bar: "HUSKERS — FIRST-EVER BIG TEN REGULAR SEASON TITLE". Confident, historic moment.
**Mood:** Program milestone, championship pride

stories.title: **Headline:** SEC Tournament Opens Today — First Round at John Cropp Stadium in Lexington

x_posts.label: Post 4-1
x_posts.text: IT'S HERE. The 2026 SEC Softball Tournament opens TODAY in Lexington. First round: No. 11 Missouri vs. No. 14 Auburn (1 PM ET, SEC Network). No. 10 Mississippi State vs. No. 15 Kentucky right after. Let the madness begin. #SECSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 4-2
x_posts.text: SEC Tournament bracket reminder: No. 1 OU and No. 2 Alabama have double byes — they enter Thursday. Today is about the bubble teams fighting for survival. Watch on SEC Network. #SECSoftball #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** FSU Enters ACC Tournament as No. 1 Seed — National Seed Stakes at Palmer Park

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: No. 10 Florida State (43-8) is the No. 1 seed in the ACC Tournament, which starts TOMORROW in Charlottesville. Isa Torres. National seed on the line. Selection Show is in 5 days. #FSUSoftball #ACCSoftball

article.headline: Florida State Enters ACC Tournament as No. 1 Seed — National Seed and WCWS Hosting Rights on the Line

stories.title: **Headline:** WCWS Countdown — 23 Days to Devon Park, Selection Show in 5 Days

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text: The WCWS is 23 days away. Devon Park. May 28. Selection Show is THIS SUNDAY at 7 PM ET on ESPN2. Conference tournaments decide everything. Who's your pick to cut down the nets in OKC? #Softball #NCAASoftball

stories.title: **Headline:** Conference Tournament Week — Every Bracket, Time, and Channel You Need

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text: Conference tournament week starts TODAY. SEC: May 5-9 Lexington. Big Ten: May 6-9 College Park. Big 12: May 7-9 OKC. ACC: May 6-9 Charlottesville. Selection Show: May 10, 7 PM ET ESPN2. Save this. 🥎 #CollegeSoftball
